name: IgniteBot
description: Full-featured WhatsApp Bot with 30+ features: AI chat, sticker maker, media downloader, group management, e-commerce, booking system, analytics dashboard and more.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID (any format: NEXUS-MD:~..., base64, raw JSON, or https:// URL). Deploy first, pair via /pair or scan QR, then copy the Session ID and paste here so the bot auto-connects on every restart.

ADMIN_NUMBERS.description: Comma-separated bot owner/admin phone numbers WITHOUT the + sign. Example: 12345678901,447911123456

APP_URL.description: Your Heroku app's public HTTPS URL (e.g. https://mybot.herokuapp.com). Required to enable the keep-alive self-ping that prevents Eco/Basic dynos from sleeping.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Heroku Postgres add-on sets this automatically. Leave blank on panels/VPS — the bot uses local file storage instead.

PAIR_SITE_URL.description: URL of the external pairing site used to generate session IDs. Defaults to the built-in pairing endpoint.

PORT.description: HTTP port for the web dashboard. Heroku assigns this automatically. Panels: set to any open port (default: 5000).

PRINT_QR.description: Set to 'true' to force-print the WhatsApp QR code in the terminal/logs (useful on any platform where you have console access).
